vocab.example: To counteract a sedentary lifestyle, I make a conscious effort to take the stairs instead of the elevator.

vocab.meaning: phương pháp toàn diện (cả thể chất lẫn tinh thần)
vocab.example: I take a holistic approach to my well-being by balancing rigorous gym sessions with mindfulness meditation.
I try to incorporate more nutrient-dense foods like kale and quinoa into my daily meals to boost my energy levels.
Swimming is my preferred way to improve cardiovascular endurance without putting too much strain on my joints.

vocab.word: be in the prime of health
vocab.meaning: đang ở thời kỳ sung sức nhất về sức khỏe
vocab.example: Now that I've refined my sleep schedule and diet, I feel like I'm finally in the prime of health.

vocab.meaning: sự gắng sức về thể chất
vocab.example: After a long day of mental work, I find that a bit of moderate physical exertion helps me clear my mind.
Consuming fermented foods and staying hydrated are essential habits to fortify the immune system against seasonal flu.

vocab.meaning: tuân thủ một chế độ (ăn uống/tập luyện) nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: It can be challenging to adhere to a strict exercise regimen during the holidays, but consistency is key.

vocab.meaning: giấc ngủ giúp hồi phục sức khỏe
vocab.example: I prioritize getting eight hours of restorative sleep each night to ensure my body can repair itself.
Drinking a glass of water before meals helps to curb my appetite and prevents overeating.
